message: Morning check-in ☀️ 1) Mood emoji for how you woke up? 2) Did you eat anything late last night? 3) What are you going to eat today (plan/commitment)? 4) Morning pages: did you do them? (Y/N) 5) Reflection: What would make today a win? 6) Reflection: What's the most likely derailment, and what's your counter-move?
